rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Motion For Protective Order Denying Defendants Civic Center Hotel, Llc And Balwantsinh Thakors Demand For Inspection Of Units

rulings.Case Title: CINDY YU ET AL VS. SHAWN SHAO DAN YU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment, Or In The Alternative To Correct The Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 27, 2015, line 3. PLAINTIFFs CINDY YU and TOSHIYUKI MUSHA's Motion To Vacate Judgment, Or In The Alternative To Correct The Judgment GRANTED. May 6, 2015 is vacated. 7 out of 8 causes of action in the complaint have not been adjudicated by the Court, and in fact, have not been addressed before the Court at any time prior to Judgment being presented to the Court adjudicating all causes of action in the case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUE YUE, LLC VS. MICHAEL FRIDMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 27, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANTs MICHAEL FRIDMAN and GALINA FRIDMAN's Motion For Reconsideration GRANTED. August 13, 2015 shall be modified as follows starting page 2:14 at paragraph 2: 2. Motion for Summary Adjudication as to affirmative defense re: lack of landlord-tenant relationship and 3rd, 9th, 17th, 21st affirmative defenses is DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding Plaintiff's ownership and landlord-tenants relationship with Defendants. 3. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED as to the 6th, 10th, 11th, 12th and 22nd affirmative defenses. Per the Operating Agreement, (Ex. C to Collier Declaration) 1708 Pacific, LLC's goal is "to convert the Property primarily to residential use, gain substantial income and appreciation in value¿" 4. Motion for Summary Adjudication is GRANTED as to all other remaining affirmative defenses. No substantive opposition in the Points and Authorities. Prevailing party prepare order Granting the Motion for Reconsideration and Amended Order re: Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FREEDOM WEST HOMES VS. GEORGIA PEMBERTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 27, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF FREDOM WEST HOMES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Continued to September 8, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than August 28, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
